title: Peruvian Stir Fry with Fragrant Onion
description: A flavorful and quick Peruvian-inspired dish made with fragrant onions, served with a side of stir-fried ingredients.

ingredients.name: Stir Fry
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or peanut oil for stir-frying

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped fragrant onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers, carrots, and snow peas to the skillet. Cook for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Peruvian spice blend, soy sauce, and lime juice. Pour the sauce over the vegetables in the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve the stir-fry over cooked rice, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Season with salt to taste, if needed.
